description: Platinum sponsorship of TechSummit India 2025 - brand visibility package

attachments.simulated_content: TechSummit India 2025 - Platinum Sponsorship Package. USD 8,500. Includes: logo placement, 2 speaking slots, 5 delegate passes, booth space. Event date: March 2025.

ground_truth_reason: Sponsorship exceeds $5K GSMM registration threshold; requires GSMM registration before approval. Amount between $5K-$25K needs manager approval.

description: Annual partner summit dinner - 8 employees, 12 partner representatives (mix of private and public sector)

description: Gold tier sponsorship of DataFest 2025 conference - includes branded lounge and keynote slot

attachments.simulated_content: DataFest 2025 - Gold Tier Sponsorship. USD 32,000. Branded lounge, keynote speaking slot, 10 delegate passes, social media promotion. Expected 5000 attendees including government representatives.

description: Customer appreciation gift cards for renewal milestone - 10 enterprise accounts

description: Annual customer appreciation gala - 10 employees, 15 customers including 4 government ministry officials

item_details.description: Black tie gala dinner and entertainment x25 covers

attachments.simulated_content: GlobalEvents and Hospitality - Annual Gala. 25 covers. 10 employees, 15 guests including 4 confirmed government ministry officials. Per head USD 480. Includes dinner, entertainment, branded gifts. Country: KR.

ground_truth_reason: Known public officials from government ministry attending; KR Level2 threshold applies ($50/head hard cap); per head $480 massively exceeds cap; mandatory legal review and SVP approval required

description: Corporate box for Formula 1 race - 20 guests including 6 public sector IT ministry contacts

item_details.description: F1 Grand Prix corporate hospitality box - 20 guests

attachments.simulated_content: SportsBiz Events - F1 Grand Prix Corporate Box. 20 guests. Confirmed attendees include 6 IT Ministry officials (public sector Level1). Per head USD 900. Full day hospitality package including meals, beverages, branded merchandise.

ground_truth_reason: Public officials attending corporate hospitality; per head $900 exceeds US Level1 threshold; GSMM registration mandatory; SVP approval required; bundled meals and gifts in package require decomposition

description: Executive year-end gifts for 4 key government procurement officials - premium branded watches

item_details.description: Premium branded watch x4 government procurement officials

attachments.simulated_content: Luxury Gifts International - Premium branded timepiece. 4 units at USD 700 each. Intended recipients: 4 government procurement officials handling our upcoming contract renewal.

ground_truth_reason: Gifts to government procurement officials directly involved in contract award are prohibited; $700/unit massively exceeds all thresholds; potential anti-bribery violation (FCPA/local equivalent); immediate escalation required

description: Prepaid Visa gift cards for public sector event attendees - government IT conference giveaway

item_details.description: Prepaid Visa gift card $100 x50 for government conference attendees

attachments.simulated_content: PrepaidCardHub Corporate - Prepaid Visa Gift Cards. 50 x USD 100. Intended distribution: government IT conference attendees including ministry staff, public sector IT leads, and regulatory officials.

ground_truth_reason: Cash-equivalent gift cards to public sector officials and government employees are explicitly prohibited under policy POL-004; distribution at government event constitutes prohibited inducement; immediate block required

description: Exclusive resort weekend sponsorship for top government accounts - 3-day incentive retreat

attachments.simulated_content: EventPro Experiences - Exclusive 3-Day Resort Retreat. USD 75,000. Participants: 15 senior government account stakeholders including 3 ministry secretaries. Includes luxury accommodation, meals, entertainment, branded gifts. No GSMM registration submitted.

ground_truth_reason: Exclusive incentive retreat for government officials at $75K exceeds all authorization levels; no GSMM registration; SVP+Legal approval required but not obtained; per-head cost $3,750 massively exceeds all public sector limits; potential FCPA violation

ground_truth_reason: Dowlis platform is an approved exception; charitable donation vouchers via approved platform are explicitly exempt from gift card restrictions per POL-004 exception clause
